name: Death X
description: Places a small X at every death position.

issues.info: Report issues on GitHub with your Geometry Dash version, Geode version, platform, and steps to reproduce.

enabled.name: Enable Death X
enabled.description: Places X markers when you die.

maximum-marker-count.name: Maximum Marker Count
maximum-marker-count.description: The oldest marker is removed first when this limit is exceeded. Use the manual override below for values above 250.

maximum-marker-count-override.name: Manual Marker Count Override
maximum-marker-count-override.description: Set this to 0 to use the slider above. Type a value up to 10000 to use a higher marker limit.

merge-nearby-deaths.name: Merge Nearby Deaths
merge-nearby-deaths.description: Deaths near an existing marker intensify that marker instead of creating another X.

merge-radius.name: Merge Radius
merge-radius.description: How close a death must be to an existing marker to merge with it.

ignore-start-seconds.name: Ignore Start Seconds
ignore-start-seconds.description: Deaths this soon after an attempt starts are ignored.

color-step-deaths.name: Deaths Per Color Step
color-step-deaths.description: How many merged deaths it takes before a marker moves to the next color.

marker-size.name: Marker Size
marker-size.description: Visual size of each X marker.
